Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
WT: 2.6 Size: MEDIUM
Class: SHD
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)

Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 24
DMG: 19 Dmg Bonus: 35

Post Comment
Hmmm...
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2004 at 7:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773858208
Scholar
43 posts
While the absence of stats may make it sound worthless, this item has an awesome ratio for people too low to get the value of better 1HB SK weapons. 19/24 is damn great even without any stats, and with haste, wow. Besides, the primary value of a weapon is the ratio, not the stats. There are plenty of weapons with good stats and crappy ratios.

#REDACTED, Posted: Jul 21 2002 at 1:58 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Give me a holla as any of my alts if U have one for sale on the POVAR server. I have 2 Shadow Knights and would use this well.
Absolutly amazing
QuoteReply
# Jul 16 2002 at 1:28 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591780934715
Scholar
77 posts
This weapon is simply astonishing. I have this with an SBS and SCHW and my damage output is insane, level 22 and can still take a red without having to waste HT... at 189 str (199 with Siphon Str) I hit for mid to high 50's and with the SCHW the delay is kicked down to about 20-21... I wouldnt give this thing up for anything... best 2.5k I've ever spent.
▲ Page top
great for DEs
QuoteReply
# Jul 06 2002 at 6:02 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592254995817
5 posts
cant beat the damage output for the price..4k weapon..on E'ci anyway..I love mine..now if I could just afford a can of motivation..it seems like all I do is flop down in EC and uberize myself at level 51 just so I can..mug forest giants for more money for more stuff..


Oh, if you have reasonable int, get the Ebon, if you need int, get a Noct and stop wasting your time with a Moss, even though it isn't bad at all for the price

# Apr 25 2002 at 11:39 PM Rating: Decent

The ebon mace is much better than the moss imo, i got it for 5k luckly, I can deal much more damage with this and my handwraps than with moss
▲ Page top
int vs. damage
QuoteReply
# Mar 30 2002 at 1:47 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591761666008
34 posts
as far as the whole casting versus damage thing between MoSS and Ebon Mace, I think it depends on how you play your character. In a group with a healer backup, I think your spells become more supplements and the most important factor is damage output. On the other hand, someone who is prone to solo combat might want the added int for better success with lifetap line of spells = less downtime between fights. But I think that overall the Ebon Mace is a much better weapon

Edited, Tue May 14 17:23:25 2002
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Jan 23 2002 at 1:02 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) WTS Ebon Mace 15k MT send me a tell, its yours.
Ebon Mace
QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2001 at 6:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591773792610
1 post
This Mace ROCKS for the amount of difficulty required to get it - esp' if you are a casual player and don't have time to join up with a raid guild that will be doing ToV.

OS is a fairly well used zone, if you continually try and get D2 groups for a few months on end you should eventually see one of these as well as raking in some XP and some other items/plat.

Jade Maces
QuoteReply
# Sep 20 2001 at 9:34 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592249346155
17 posts
Verant does not set prices on items. It is the good old fasioned Supply and Demand rule.

It's what people are willing to pay that sets the price.
▲ Page top
RE: Jade Maces
QuoteReply
# Nov 09 2001 at 7:14 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591766061193
9 posts
Would like to throw a question out to all of us SKs out there. As an ogre SK would you prefer a Noc Blade 18/26 plus 15 dex or an Ebon Mace 19/24 and why??

I have a Noc blade at the moment but was thinking of maybe trying out an Ebon mace to seee what works best for my style of play.

My problem is that my SK Ogre, misses so damn much. I really like this character (lvl 45) but its so frustrating at times just because of the fact that I miss so much during a fight. Agi and Dex is at 121 so its not that bad fo(for an Ogre).. This is my alt and I am trying to twink her and have some fun with her. I was hoping that by switching to a Ebon Mace I would be able to miss less (less delay and more damage)

Can anyone pls make some logical suggestions on how i can miss less during a fight..


Any logical explanation would be real nice
▲ Page top
RE: Jade Maces
QuoteReply
# Jun 04 2002 at 3:40 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592759354137
6 posts
yea being a big race as yourself u should use 2HS or 2HB.
light swords are for small races.
im lvl 24 and useing a Axe of lost sould hit for 6o and 75 if lucky.
i also use MOSS do around 40 with it.
just my 2cp
▲ Page top
RE: Jade Maces
QuoteReply
# Mar 08 2002 at 5:29 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593361422654
14 posts
If I was an Ogre SK I would use nothing but 2 handed weapons.

Why bother with a 1 hander since you can bash 2 handed?
▲ Page top
RE: Jade Maces
QuoteReply
# Jan 16 2002 at 10:23 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592245599226
View User Forum
64 posts
First off, AGI and DEX have nothing to do with how often you hit. This is a constant misconception. DEX will, however, help you double attack more often which will give you more chances to try and hit.

The only factors are, offensive skill, weapons skill, and attack vs the mobs AC, defensive skill, ability to riposte/dodge/parry (which is raised by AGI).

The other thing is, if you haven't noticed, SK's weapon and offensive skills stop going up after 40! They will not kick in again until 51. This is when SKs loose there place in DMG dealing and start becoming strong defensive class (since rangers and other damage dealers will become quickly offense and loose their defensive edge).

You're not hitting because Verant doesn't want you to hit. =P

Plain and simple.
▲ Page top
RE: Jade Maces
QuoteReply
# Feb 14 2002 at 6:55 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591772995121
39 posts
Uhh, most melees skills are maxed around 40 and will nto go up again til 51 for all classes.

for god sakes verent make this mace black!ebon=black
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Jun 19 2001 at 2:13 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) OK - first of all, it takes TWO jade maces to beat the damage output of the ebon mace. 9/18 vs 19/24 = BIG diff. Add the fact that SKs can't dual wield in the FIRST place. Toss in the fact that there are LOTS of other monk weaps in the same general range as jade mace (wu's on the cheap end, primal above jade) and only a few very nice and very common weaps that are still far below this (such as MoSS and Wurm) for SKs. The only real 1h weap between MoSS and Ebon is the noct and it's still insanely expensive. No good substitutes = premium price.
ebon mace=own

These commonly go for about 20k. Not 52k.
▲ Page top
#Anonymous, Posted: Mar 16 2001 at 11:00 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Yeah..and your a moron. 20k roflmao. Hmmm jade mace is 14-15...so your saying this is only worth 5k more. Get a clue before you mislead people with prices.
RE: Price
QuoteReply
# Mar 26 2001 at 5:41 AM Rating: Good
Anonymous
View User Forum
Anonymous
That may be true, but jade maces have a very large market of buyers, whereas only shadowknights buy these. Lower demand=lower market price.
▲ Page top
RE: Price
QuoteReply
# Apr 16 2001 at 2:09 PM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591755682992
37 posts
Agreed. I know that on my server, at the busiest time if you do a "/who all shadow 50 60" you won't get more than 15 people. So it is a simple matter of supply and demand. I get frequent tells by people trying to sell blood ember. It is easier for people to ask every high level SK on a server if they want to buy a high end item than to auction it.
A MOSS (SK only 1hb) has stats of 19/29 10int. You can get them for less than 5k now. This would be a ridiculously low price if it were a warrior item.

SK's can't dual wield. Thus high dam/del weapons for us are more common than for warriors. So an equivalent warrior weapon would sell for a LOT more.

I have seen asking prices of 20kpp in auction on the ebon on more than one occasion. So no, I am not misleading anyone.

And if you don't get it, take Econ 101
▲ Page top
INT? No.
QuoteReply
# Dec 31 2000 at 5:53 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1591750541411
9 posts
The Ebon Mace doesn't give any INT, you're confusing it with the Mace of Shadowed Souls.
